summary: During mastication, guidng cusps primarily interact through lingual grooves but can also engage with embrasures; thus, embracing a broader perspective enhances understanding of dental function dynamics. Based on this insight, option \(\boxed{\text{B}}\) appears most accurate reflecting multiple possible paths of cusp engagement.
